_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin knockdown in human Schwann cells: clues to vestibular schwannoma tumorigenesis.

_contextSnippet: By day 7, robust expression of EGFR, ErbB2 and ErbB3 is detected by Western blot analysis
resourceName: polyclonal anti-ErbB2 (1:250; Santa Cruz Biotechnology, Santa Cruz, CA)
details: Successfully detected robust ErbB2 expression by Western blot analysis by day 7 following merlin depletion
